properties.name: Suppression: Tillite Etchings
properties.description: ATK +{atk_up:0.0%}. When the wielder's battle skill applies Nature Infliction, other operators in the team gain Arts DMG Dealt +{spell_dmg_up:0.0%} for {duration:0}s. For every enemy suffering from Nature Infliction applied by the said battle skill, other operators in the team gain bonus Arts DMG Dealt +{spell_dmg_up2:0.0%}, up to a max of +{spell_dmg_up2*max_stack:0.0%}. Effects of the same name cannot stack.
